{
  "claims": [
    "Health Care Sharing Ministries (HCSMs) are an alternative form of health care coverage for members of faith-based communities.",
    "HCSM members are exempted from individual mandate penalties under the federal Affordable Care Act.",
    "Healthcare sharing ministries were a vital component of the Affordable Care Act signed into law by President Obama.",
    "Senate Democrats voted to eliminate the exemption from the individual mandate which was explicitly protected by the Affordable Care Act.",
    "Governor Newsom’s individual mandate proposal does not extend the penalty to members of health care sharing ministries.",
    "Health Care Sharing Ministries provide an alternative co-op business strategy for covering medical costs.",
    "Health Care Sharing Ministries are described as a community-based self-insurance model.",
    "Tens of thousands of people across California have chosen to utilize Health Care Sharing Ministries for their healthcare insurance needs.",
    "More than a million people across America have chosen to participate in Health Care Sharing Ministries as an alternative to high-cost insurance plans."
